close_reason: Decision: fix now with constructors + #[non_exhaustive] in a version-bump PR.
description: BackendRegistration, WritableBackendRegistration, and SigningBackendRegistration in secretx-core/src/lib.rs all have public fields (pub name: &'static str, pub factory: fn(...)) with no #[non_exhaustive] attribute. Adding any new field in a future minor version is a breaking change: any downstream code using struct literal syntax to construct these structs will fail to compile. What goes wrong: a minor-version field addition (e.g. pub description: &'static str) forces a SemVer major bump or silently breaks users who rely on exhaustive struct construction. All three registration structs are affected. Fix: add #[non_exhaustive] to all three.
title: BackendRegistration structs missing #[non_exhaustive]
